name: compass
description: Drive Compass Labs' non-custodial DeFi API via the compass CLI or the hosted MCP server — lend, borrow, earn yield, swap, perps, tokenized equities, gas sponsorship. Never signs or holds keys.

interface.shortDescription: On-chain DeFi via the compass CLI or MCP server
interface.longDescription: Delegate on-chain DeFi to Compass Labs via the compass CLI or the hosted MCP server: turn plain-English intents into ready-to-sign transactions for lending/borrowing (Aave), yield (Morpho/ERC-4626 vaults, Pendle), swaps, perps, tokenized equities, and gas-sponsored transactions on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base. Non-custodial — returns unsigned transactions for the user's wallet to sign.
defaultPrompt: Find the highest-yield USDC vault on Base and deposit into it.
